summary: Iteration 57: Tested About page hero section admin controls (logo, title, subtitle, divider with visibility/alignment/styling) and Pricing Hub typing bug fix. All features working correctly.

issues: Minor console warning: span cannot be child of option (hydration warning) - does not affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: All About page hero controls and Pricing Hub typing fix verified working. Settings stored in page_heroes.about.

code_review_notes.pricing_hub_fix: Cell component correctly moved outside PricingHubTab to prevent re-creation on render. Uses local state with onBlur to commit changes - proper fix for focus loss bug.
code_review_notes.about_page_hero: Hero section reads from page_heroes.about with proper fallbacks. Conditional visibility/alignment working correctly.
